data.name: CoulroFans
data.detailed_description:
Rent is due, so is the maintenance fee, and you need money for groceries too. But you're just a broke college dropout with a cute Jester girlfriend.

Fortunately for you, there is a CoulroFans, a fetish adult site focusing on clowns and jesters that takes donations from fans.

You decide it is time to earn a living through building your account on the site. This will require recording and uploading various content such as this:

In CoulroFans, you'll have to

-Earn money

-Pay bills

-Train your girlfriend

-Film content to upload

-Take your girlfriend on dates

-Manage her health and happiness

-Buy items and gifts

-As well as help your girlfriend with life issues she faces

For money problems aren't the only thing you and she has. Her gambling, alcoholic father is due to get out of prison, and you'll have to deal with whatever baggage he bring along.

The game features not just dating sim and money management but also decision making as the plot progresses. Your decisions have impact on outcome of certain events that could not only provide advantages or disadvantages but also affect the ending.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
